description_long: This airplane features a sleek, futuristic design with a streamlined fuselage and a rounded, dark-tinted nose cone. The wings are straight and extend horizontally from the midsection, each equipped with two visible engine nacelles mounted beneath. The surface is metallic with a dark gray base color, accented by glowing cyan lines that trace along the contours of the body and wings, giving it a high-tech appearance. The cockpit is smoothly integrated into the forward section of the fuselage, with a large, dark canopy that appears to be enclosed. The tail section is minimalistic, lacking a traditional vertical stabilizer, and the undercarriage does not show any visible landing gear. The overall form suggests a compact, agile aircraft suitable for advanced urban environments.
description: A compact, futuristic airplane with a metallic gray body, glowing cyan accents, and twin engine nacelles under each wing. It features a rounded, dark cockpit and a minimalistic tail design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, straight wings with two engine nacelles under each wing and the streamlined, pointed nose.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the smooth, aerodynamic fuselage, the rounded cockpit canopy, and the wing's mid-mounted position.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded back of the fuselage, the absence of a traditional tail fin, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same streamlined profile and engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings, no visible winglets, and a flat dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Quad jet engines, two mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Minimalist tail with no visible vertical stabilizer or conventional tail surfaces.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large, dark canopy integrated into the fuselage.
